name: Sunshine Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F, with rack in center of oven.
2. Have ready a 10-inch tube cake pan (do not grease).
3. Sift cake flour three times and set aside on waxed paper.
4. Sift sugar five times and set aside on waxed paper.
5. Beat egg yolks until thick and light-colored, about 4 minutes. Set aside.
6. Beat egg whites until foamy. Add cream of tartar and salt. Continue beating
until egg whites are thick and hold their shape but are still soft and moist.
7. Gently fold sugar into whites in three batches.
8. Fold in lemon extract, grated zest, and reserved egg yolks until blended.
9. Gently fold in flour.
10. Transfer batter to pan and spread evenly with a spatula.
11. Bake until lightly browned and a toothpick inserted into the center comes
out clean, about 45 minutes.
12. Invert the pan to let the cake cool completely.
13. Use a flexible knife to release the cake from the sides and bottom of the
pan.
14. Cover well at room temperature for up to one day or freeze up to three
months.
15. To serve, spread lemony frosting on top and sides.
Lemony Frosting:
1. Place all ingredients except milk or water in a mixing bowl.
2. Combine with a wooden spoon until smooth.
3. Add milk or water as necessary for the desired consistency.
4. Spread over the cake.
